channel.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:
Documentation

  • Opticstars807 - Maintain an accurate API specification without writing OpenAPI/Swagger. Works with any Stack

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Testing

Mocking

  • Mockoon - Easily create mock APIs locally. No remote deployment, no account required, open source.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2020
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • Milkmanstars734 - Extensible cross-platform request/response workbench, not only for http calls.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Standards

  • HAL - Simple format that gives a consistent and easy way to hyperlink between resources in your API (see: HATEOAS).

    • API Gateway

  • KrakenDstars3.9k Ultra performant API Gateway with middleware. Written in Go.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • ExtendsClass - Make HTTP requests with a simple web-based HTTP client.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 5th - Aug 11th, 2019
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • TestMace - Cross-platform simple but powerful IDE for API automation testing.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Servers

Scala

  • Chaosstars248 - A lightweight framework for writing REST services in Scala.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Servers

Python

  • FastAPIstars30.8k - FastAPI is a modern, fast (high-performance), web framework for building APIs with Python 3.6+ based on standard Python type hints. With automatic API documentation using Swagger UI and ReDoc, based on OpenAPI and JSON Schema.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Servers

Node.js

  • Nestjsx/crudstars2.3k - Generate CRUD controllers and services for RESTful API with NestJS and TypeORM.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Mar 11th - Mar 17th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • react-adminstars16.8k - Add a ReactJS admin GUI to any RESTful API.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 18th - Feb 24th, 2019
item.description:
API Gateway

  • Express Gatewaystars2.5k - Microservices API Gateway built on top of ExpressJS (Node.js).

    • Testing

    Mocking

  • RequestBin - Inspect and debug webhook requests sent by your clients or third-party APIs.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • HTTP Promptstars8.2k - HTTP Prompt is an interactive command-line HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting, built on HTTPie and prompt_toolkit.
  • Insomniastars16.3k - Cross-platform HTTP and GraphQL Client

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
SaaS Tools

  • Beeceptor - An HTTP inspecting, mocking and proxing service. Gives named endpoints for creating mock API endpoints and simulate responses.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Servers

Python

  • Falconstars8.4k - Falcon is a bare-metal Python web API framework for building high-performance microservices, app backends, and higher-level frameworks.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Servers

Node.js

  • rest-hapistars1.1k - Generate RESTful API based on mongoose models that supports relational data.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Servers

Directly On Top Of A RMDB

  • pRESTstars2.7k - A fully RESTful API from any existing PostgreSQL database written in Go.

    • Testing

    Mocking

  • DuckRailsstars1.7k - Mock quickly & dynamically API endpoints.

    • Documentation

  • Slatestars32.5k - Beautiful and responsive three-panel API documentation using Middleman.

    • SaaS Tools

  • Moesif - API Analytics for Debugging, Monitoring, and Usage Tracking for RESTful and GraphQL.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
SaaS Tools

  • 3scale - Nginx based API gateway to integrate internal and external API services with 3scale's API Management Platform.

    • API Gateway

  • Kongstars28.9k - Scalable, distributed, and plugin oriented API gateway backed by Nginx.
  • Tyk API Gatewaystars6.2k - Lightweight API gateway with analytics logging, written in Go.
  • API Umbrellastars1.7k - API management platform for exposing web services, with web interface and analytics, written in Lua.
  • WSO2 API Managementstars521 - API management tool with lightweight gateway and API lifecycle manangement, written in Java.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Servers

Ruby

  • Grape - Opinionated micro-framework for creating REST-like APIs in Ruby.
  • Rails - RailsGuides: Using Rails for API-only applications.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Servers

Java

  • Dropwizardstars7.9k - A framework for developing ops-friendly, high-performance, RESTful web services.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Servers

Python

  • apistarstars5.6k - A smart Web API framework, designed for Python 3.
  • hug - Lightweight and fast API Framework.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • swagger-codegenstars13k - Auto generation of client libraries or server stubs given an OpenAPI specification (formerly known as the Swagger Specification).

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Servers

Node.js

  • Expressastars354 - Express middleware for creating APIs from JSON schemas with a simple admin editor and permissions model.

    • SaaS Tools

  • Assertible - Continuously test and monitor your APIs after deployments and across environments.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:

Mocking

  • Request Basketsstars110 - Service to collect HTTP requests and inspect them via RESTful API or web UI.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Lumberstars2.1k - Generate the admin interface of your application.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 24th - Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • rest-assuredstars5.3k - Java DSL for easy testing of REST services.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Servers

Java

  • Vertx-Webstars873 - Vert.x-Web is a set of building blocks for building web applications with Vert.x, a toolkit for building reactive applications on the JVM.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
Clients

Ruby Clients

  • raml-ruby-client-generatorstars1 - Auto generate API client from a RAML file.

    • Clients

    Go Clients

  • restystars4.2k - Simple HTTP and REST client for Go inspired by Ruby rest-client.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2016
item.description:
Servers

Python

  • Flask-Potionstars484 - Flask-Potion is a powerful Flask extension for building RESTful JSON APIs. It also provides several Clients for easier access to the API.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Servers

PHP

  • Fusiostars959 - Open source API management platform.

item.description:
Documentation

  • ReDocstars13.8k - OpenAPI/Swagger-powered three-panel documentation.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2016
item.description:
Servers

Symfony2

  • NelmioApiDocBundlestars2k - Generate documentation for your REST API from annotations.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Clients

Ruby Clients

  • httpartystars5.4k - Makes HTTP fun again!
  • Net::HTTP - Net::HTTP provides a rich library which can be used to build HTTP user-agents.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Testing

Public REST APIs To Use In Tests

  • APIs.guru - Wikipedia for Web APIs, each API has OpenAPI/Swagger description.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Standards

  • OpenAPI - Formerly known as the Swagger Specification, OpenAPI specifcation is the world’s most popular description format for defining Restful APIs.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2016
item.description:
Documentation

  • raml2htmlstars1.1k - Generates HTML documentation from a RAML file.

    • Servers

    Python

  • Ramses - Makes RAML files executable by generating production-ready APIs from them at runtime.

    • Clients

    JavaScript Clients

  • raml-client-generatorstars120 - Generates static client libs for js.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
Testing

Mocking

  • httpbin - HTTP request and response service - a/k/a Swiss Army Knife for HTTP.

    • Testing

    Public REST APIs To Use In Tests

  • Deck of Cards API - Open API for simulating a deck of cards.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
SaaS Tools

  • Ping-API - Automated API Monitoring & Testing.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2015
item.description:
Servers

Haskell

  • Rest for Haskellstars388 - This package allows you to create REST APIs in Haskell. These APIs can be run in different web frameworks. They can also be used to automatically generate documentation as well as client libraries.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2015
item.description:
SaaS Tools

  • Amazon API Gateway - Amazon API Gateway is a fully managed service that makes it easy for developers to create, publish, maintain, monitor, and secure APIs at any scale.
  • Apigee - Apigee is the leading provider of API technology and services for enterprises and developers.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Servers

Node.js

  • node-restifystars10.1k - Framework specifically meant for REST API.

    • Servers

    Symfony2

  • API Platformstars6.7k - Specialize Symfony edition for the creation of hypermedia REST APIs.

    • Testing

    Querying

  • httpiestars50.7k - Command line HTTP client, far more dev-friendly than curl.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2015
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • Http-consolestars1.4k - Command line interface for HTTP that let you speak HTTP like a local

    • Servers

    Node.js

  • Feathers - is a real-time, micro-service web framework that gives you control over your data via RESTful resources, sockets and flexible plug-ins.

    • Servers

    Go

  • go-restfulstars4.1k - A declarative highly readable framework for building restful API's.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2015
item.description:
Clients

JavaScript Clients

  • traversonstars385 - A Hypermedia API/HATEOAS Client for Node.js and the Browser

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2015
item.description:
Servers

Python

  • Python Eve - Eve is an open source Python REST API framework designed for human beings. It allows to effortlessly build and deploy highly customizable, fully featured RESTful Web Services.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2015
item.description:
Standards

  • JSON API - Standard for building APIs in JSON.
  • RAML - Simple and succinct way to describe RESTful API.
  • JSend - Simple specification that lays down some rules for how JSON responses from web servers should be formatted.
  • OData - Open protocol to allow the creation and consumption of queryable and interoperable RESTful APIs. Quite complex.
  • JSON-LD - Standard for describing Linked Data and hypermedia relations in JSON (W3C).
  • Hydra - Vocabulary for Hypermedia-Driven Web APIs (W3C).
  • Schema.org - Collection of schemas describing common data models.

    • Clients

    PHP Clients

  • Guzzle - HTTP client and framework for consuming RESTful web services.
  • Buzzstars1.9k - Another lightweight HTTP client.
  • unirest for PHPstars1.2k - Simplified, lightweight HTTP client library.

    • Clients

    JavaScript Clients

  • restangularstars8k - AngularJS service to handle REST API properly and easily.
  • restful.jsstars979 - JS client for interacting with server-side RESTful resources.

    • Clients

    Node.js Clients

  • restlerstars2k - REST client library for node.js.
  • unirest for Node.jsstars934 - Simplified, lightweight HTTP client library.

    • Servers

    Directly On Top Of A RMDB

  • postgreststars17k - Serve a fully RESTful API directly from an existing PostgreSQL database.
  • MySQL HTTP plugin - Simple REST-like / CRUD server for any MySQL database.

    • Servers

    Node.js

  • Sails.js - Node.js Web framework embedding a command to generate automatically a REST API.
  • mersstars345 - Express service exposing Mongoose finders as RESTful API.
  • Baucisstars652 - Build scalable REST API based on your Mongoose entities.
  • flatiron/resourcefulstars355 - Isomorphic Resource engine for JavaScript.
  • loopback - Powerful Node.js framework for creating APIs and easily connecting to backend data sources.

    • Servers

    PHP

  • Microreststars190 - Micro-web application providing a REST API on top of any relational database.
  • Negotiationstars1.2k - Content negotiation library.
  • Dreststars86 - Library for exposing Doctrine entities as REST resource endpoints.
  • Restlerstars1.3k - Lightweight framework to expose PHP methods as RESTful web API.
  • HALstars201 - Hypertext Application Language (HAL) builder library.
  • Apigilitystars465 - API builder built with Zend Framework 2.
  • phpreststars314 - Specialized REST microframework for PHP.
  • Hateoasstars970 - PHP library to support implementing representations for HATEOAS REST web services.

    • Servers

    Symfony2

  • REST APIs with Symfony2: the Right Way - Complete guide to build a state-of-the-art REST API with Symfony2 framework.
  • FOSRestBundlestars2.6k - Bundle handling view, routing, error handling, etc. for your REST API.
  • stanlemon/rest-bundlestars127 - Build a REST API based on Doctrine entities using conventions over configuration.
  • lakion/Lionframe - Glu between several community libraries to ease API development.
  • BazingaHateoasBundlestars289 - Integrate the Hateoasstars970 library into a Symfony2 application.
  • Symfony REST Editionstars641 - Start with a Symfony2 application with all REST-friendly bundles pre-configured.
  • NgAdminGeneratorBundlestars77 - Boostrap ng-admin configuration based on stanlemon/rest-bundle.
  • DunglasApiBundlestars1.8k - Build a REST API which follow Hydra/JSON-LD specification.

    • Servers

    Python

  • Django REST framework - Powerful and flexible toolkit that makes it easy to build Web APIs.
  • flask-restful - Extension for Flask that adds support for quickly building REST APIs.
  • flask-restless - Flask extension for generating ReSTful APIs for database models defined with SQLAlchemy (or Flask-SQLAlchemy).
  • savory-pie - REST API building library (django, and others).

    • Servers

    Go

  • go-json-reststars3.5k - Thin layer on top of net/http that helps building RESTful APIs easily.
  • sleepystars679 - RESTful micro-framework written in Go.
  • restitstars53 - Go micro framework to help writing RESTful API integration test.
  • go-relaxstars155 - Framework of pluggable components to build RESTful API's.
  • go-reststars125 - Small and evil REST framework for Go.
  • Goatstars159 - Minimalistic REST API server in Go.
  • Resourseastars31 - REST framework for quickly writing resource based services.

    • Servers

    Java

  • RestExpressstars920 - Netty-based, highly performant, lightweight, container-less, plugin-extensible, framework that is ideal for microservice architectures.

    • Testing

    Querying

  • Postman REST Client - Chrome extension essential to test manually REST API.
  • restystars2.6k - Little command line REST client that you can use in pipelines (bash or zsh).
  • jqstars19.4k - Command line JSON processor, to use in combination with a command-line HTTP client like cURL.

    • Testing

    Mocking

  • FakeReststars353 - Patch XMLHttpRequest to fake a REST API client-side.
  • json-serverstars54k - Serve a REST API from fixture files using quick prototyping.
  • Mocky.io - Free online service to create fake HTTP responses.

    • Testing

    Public REST APIs To Use In Tests

  • ProgrammableWeb - The world's largest API repository.
  • Public APIS - Explore The Largest API Directory In The Galaxy.
  • Marvel Comics API - Query characters, stories, events about Marvel superheroes.
  • JSON Placeholder - Free online REST service that you can use whenever you need some fake data.

    • Documentation

  • Swagger - Documentation/querying web interface for REST APIs.
  • API doc - Inline Documentation for RESTful web APIs.

    • SaaS Tools

  • Runscope - Automated API Monitoring & Testing.
  • import.io Magic - Create a REST API from any website in one click.

    • Miscellaneous

  • ng-adminstars4k - Add an AngularJS admin GUI to any RESTful API.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Testing

Querying

  • HttpMaster - GUI tool for testing REST APIs and services. Windows OS only.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2015
item.description:
Testing

Mocking

  • Swagger API Mock - Mock RESTful API based on swagger schema

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2015
item.description:
Servers

Go

  • gocrudstars311: Go library to simplify creating, updating and deleting arbitrary depth structured data — to make building REST services fast and easy.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest May 11th - May 17th, 2015
item.description:
Design

  • [Architectural Styles and

    • SaaS Tools

  • Apiary - Collaborative design, instant API mock, generated documentation, integrated code samples, debugging and automated testing.

item.title: marmelab/awesome-rest May 4th - May 10th, 2015
item.description:
Clients

Ruby Clients

  • RESTClientstars5k - Simple HTTP and REST client for Ruby, inspired by microframework syntax for specifying actions.
  • Spykestars592 - Interact with REST services in an ActiveRecord-like manner.
  • exconstars1.1k - Usable, fast, simple Ruby HTTP 1.1. It works great as a general HTTP(s) client and is particularly well suited to usage in API clients.

    • Clients

    Go Clients

  • gopencilsstars438 - Small and simple package to easily consume REST APIs.

    • Servers

    Python

  • django-tastypie - Creating delicious APIs for Django apps.
  • sandmanstars2.3k - Automated REST APIs for existing database-driven systems.
  • restless - Framework agnostic REST framework based on lessons learned from TastyPie.

    • Servers

    Go

  • Zerver - Zerver is a expressive, modular, feature completed RESTful framework.
